benefits.description: Feeling the best in terms of energy output since changing dosing schedule

side_effects.description: Higher heart rate during cardio, particularly noticeable at 150-300mg/day dosing

protocol_notes: Started end of May 2025. Initial protocol: 150mg/day (50mg 3x daily) for initial period, then escalated to 300mg/day (100mg 3x daily). Recently changed to 200mg/day (100mg 2x daily) with timing adjusted to 11am-2pm (around training) and prior to bed. Changed timing to avoid impacting cardio performance. Also on TRT recently started. Full blood panel taken in April (pre-BAM15), then another full panel taken after starting TRT to verify TRT dosing. User reports no changes in blood panel attributable to BAM15. Declined to use SARMs, prefers TRT+ approach.
